title: Nanzo Dark GUI !
description: A clean dark transparent GUI texture pack that gives Minecraft a smooth, modern, and cool look 🌙✨ Designed for better visibility and minimal distraction, it creates a calm gameplay experience while keeping the interface stylish, simple, and easy to use 🎮
body:
#  🌑 Dark Semi-Transparent GUI
Enjoy a smooth dark interface with clean semi-transparent panels that give Minecraft a modern and stylish feel while keeping menus clear and comfortable for long gameplay sessions.
![Nanzo Dark Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e977ac6b1911056ec159db36b3d7304b3d4a2cf_0.webp)

## ✨ Cool Models & Visual Style
Refined GUI details, soft glow effects, and balanced colors create a simple yet premium look that feels clean, sharp, and visually satisfying.

### 🧪 Quality-of-Life Improvements
Helpful features like a clear Brewing Stand guide and better-organized menus make navigation easier and gameplay faster and more enjoyable.

**⚔️ More From Nanzo
Also check out the PvP texture pack by Nanzo[Nanzo PVP Essentials ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nanzo-pvp-essentials-!!) for a clean, smooth, and competitive combat experience.**
